metadata.title: Loco Contigo
metadata.lyrics:
[00:09.90] Tú me tienes loco, loco contigo

[00:30.09] Ma-mam-mami, tú ere' una champion
[00:32.42] Ram-pa-pa-pam-pam, con un booty fuera de lugar
[00:35.88] Una cintura chiquita, mata la cancha
[00:38.68] Tú está' fuera 'e lo normal
[00:40.87] Tú lo bate' como la avena de abuela

[00:50.47] Oh, mama, tú ere' la fama
[00:53.15] Estás conmigo y te va' mañana
[00:55.49] Cuando lo mueves todo me sana'
[00:58.18] Ere' mi antídoto cuando tengo gana'

[01:15.21] Yo trato y trato, pero baby, no te olvido
[01:20.07] Tú me tienes loco, loco contigo (come on)
[01:25.00] Yo trato y trato, pero baby, aquí yo sigo
[01:31.25] I wanna make it hot, your body on top (top)
[01:34.04] Kiss me up, wanna lip lock (lock)
[01:36.55] Party won't stop (stop), and it's four o'clock (clock)
[01:38.97] Iced out watch (Iced), I can get you one (yeah)
[01:41.47] Tell your best friend, she get one too (she get one too)
[01:44.04] Girls wanna have fun, I'm who they run to
[01:46.17] Move, move, your body know you want to
[01:48.67] One, two, baby I want you
[01:51.38] Cute face, li'l waist, move to the base
[01:53.83] That ass need a seat, you consider me
[01:56.43] That's my old girl, she an antique
[01:58.88] You got that new body, you'a art piece
[02:01.46] You like salsa (yeah), I'm saucy
[02:04.02] Caliente, muy caliente
[02:05.87] Caliente, caliente, caliente
[02:08.32] (Hey) caliente (muy caliente)
[02:09.86] Tú me tienes loco, loco contigo
[02:15.10] Yo trato y trato, pero baby, no te olvido
[02:19.97] Tú me tienes loco, loco contigo
[02:24.94] Yo trato y trato, pero baby, aquí yo sigo
[02:29.56] Tú pides lo que quieras, lo que quieras, lo que quieras
[02:34.66] Que yo lo hago a tu manera, tu manera, tu manera
